textByHashes.fd9e5ab3bb1fc05efd0faebd8341ee87f3b47aff: You looked like you wanted to speak to me, you halfwit. You dullard.
textByHashes.df866ac30d2760dce611f812ad4fd086ebf05d84: My contract stipulates that I must follow you, you insufferable ignoramus. My contract does not stipulate that I must be polite, you ignorant buffoon.
textByHashes.c39504190d356074980ed2eba2b185decab16552: How about parading me around like a trophy, you idiot clown? How about stuffing me in your rotten backpack, you inclement cretin? How about-
textByHashes.86fd4b50ae645d55a5d878c9c9aaf9eafadba8ba: -locking me in your house, you absolutely intolerable moron.
textByHashes.c36358e3df759ab0d20087d2313e822de5a137b7: I do not have the patience for you today.
textByHashes.88409e91829a7d32ea1db6f28cff7d20727efb54: You want to 'chat'? It is not enough that I must stare at your backside all day, I must suffer your sorry attempts at conversation as well?
textByHashes.63ddb5658513f758f180a8ccffe6b383e62a3c04: Somebody else? Who? Introduce me to this paragon of virtue, who can tolerate the torrent of spittle you call speech. The incoherent messes you call sentences.
textByHashes.64b55ea9f30ce83430ef6ea362d102d4f54a5277: Oh yes, your friends. And do these friends, perhaps, live very far away? Are they perhaps too busy to meet up frequently?
textByHashes.f00b639b9ba2bac50c01e6b57881d80b089e5a7b: If anybody wanted to 'chat' with you, you wouldn't be speaking to somebody contractually obliged to do so.
textByHashes.64c54b021239ccf1cc2f918f0809f79d405d1169: The next time I am left stranded by your incompetence, which I'm sure won't take long, do us both a favour and don't reclaim me.
textByHashes.fd6049d4d357c90bbfadc3105b1e2c530d90a94e: I could incinerate you if I wanted.
textByHashes.4543256e036fdbd2e61ef7f45a8056057306c926: I'm holding back because this house is actually habitable.
textByHashes.7de4f93c5f23ebbd5b394fd882881175df394b65: Get your hands off of m-
